ops.body: Scope addition (2026-07-17): yasyf.com also carries the stale semble Code Search prose (7 hits in .claude/fragments/AGENTS.md/yasyf-com-development-guide.fragment.md incl. the repo-tree comment line, 1 in CLAUDE.md) — when the tree frees, run the semble-prose-purge span treatment (delete the semble span, import cc-skills:ccx in the AGENTS.md layout, swap remaining semble.search -> ccx code search) in the same pass as the .mcp.json wiring. Reference script: workflows/scripts/semble-prose-purge-wf_f23141a0-2aa.js (session 48869672, acct-04).
